ops.title: Bump ccx pack version for the guard sink/bounded-grep changes (0.10.0) once the in-flight 0.9.0 lands
ops.description: Commits 0c0b1587 (grep guard: bounded greps run regardless of operand existence) + 022bf455/abe83002 (web guard: assignment-captured dumps are sinks) are behavior changes to the ccx pack, but the `[pack] version` bump was deferred: a concurrent session holds an UNCOMMITTED 0.8.0→0.9.0 bump plus new `[tools.*] behaves_like` mappings in both `.claude/capt-hook.toml` and `plugin/hooks/capt-hook.toml` (shared working copy, cc-transcript-v8 lineage). After that 0.9.0 lands, bump both tomls to 0.10.0 (they must match — ci.yml fails on skew) and cut the plugin release so live sessions pick up the new guard behavior (plugin.json bumps to the tag version in the release commit per AGENTS.md § Releases).

ops.text: Both capt-hook.toml files read version 0.10.0 and match
A plugin release including commits 0c0b1587/022bf455/abe83002 is tagged so live sessions load the new pack
